title: AppViewX launches identity security for enterprise AI agents
friendlyTitle: AppViewX wants to give AI agents safer identities
summary: AppViewX launched Agent Identity Security, a product for discovering, governing, securing, and monitoring AI agents across enterprises. It combines AI agent governance with machine-identity and PKI controls, including an AI bill of materials, policy enforcement, and anomalous-behavior detection.
friendlySummary: AppViewX launched a product that helps companies find, control, and monitor AI agents. It focuses on agent permissions, security policies, and unusual behavior.
whyItMatters: As agents gain access to tools, credentials, and internal systems, identity becomes a core control layer. Businesses experimenting with agents need inventory, least privilege, audit evidence, and monitoring before agents quietly become shadow infrastructure.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This helps companies avoid letting AI agents access too much data or too many tools without anyone noticing.
